sql_array: CREATE TABLE TEST_XMLS (I INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, XMLVAL XMLType, DESCRIPTION VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO TEST_XMLS VALUES (3, XMLType('<oil-rig xml:id="14a_01" water="0.413"/><oil-rig xml:id="14b_01" water="0.402"/>'), 'Oil Rig Record');

SELECT e.I, e.DESCRIPTION, XMLType.extract(e.XMLVAL, '//ename').getClobVal() AS ENAME, xpath_string('/po/poname', e.XMLVAL) AS PONAME FROM TEST_XMLS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') AND xpath_string('/po/pono', e.XMLVAL) IS NOT NULL;

SELECT e.I, e.DESCRIPTION, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY XMLType.extract(e.XMLVAL, '//ename').getClobVal()) AS NAME_COUNT FROM TEST_XMLS e GROUP BY e.I, e.DESCRIPTION, XMLType.extract(e.XMLVAL, '//ename').getClobVal();
CREATE TABLE TEST_NULLS (ID INT PRIMARY KEY, XMLVALUE XMLType);
INSERT INTO TEST_NULLS VALUES (1, NULL), (2, XMLType('<no_value/>'));
SELECT ID, XMLType.extract(XMLVALUE, '//no_value').getClobVal() AS VALUE_EXISTS FROM TEST_NULLS WHERE XMLVALUE IS NULL OR xpath_string('//no_value', XMLVALUE) IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS NULL_COUNT FROM TEST_NULLS WHERE XMLVALUE IS NULL GROUP BY ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT e.I, e.DESCRIPTION, XMLType.extract(e.XMLVAL, '//empno') AS EMPNO FROM TEST_XMLS e JOIN TEST_NULLS n ON e.I = n.ID WHERE n.XMLVALUE IS NULL;

SELECT e.I, e.DESCRIPTION, XMLType.extract(e.XMLVAL, '//empno') AS EMPNO FROM TEST_XMLS e LEFT JOIN TEST_NULLS n ON e.I = n.ID WHERE XMLType.extract(e.XMLVAL, '//ename') IS NOT NULL AND (n.XMLVALUE IS NULL OR n.XMLVALUE = XMLType('<no_value/>'));
